title: canned sprats
description:
Replaces buckets of cod and salmon with a can of sprats.

Заменяет ведра трески и лосося консервой 
шпротов.
body:
![logo sprats](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a272ce58218811828a2e575f022ec6751fd933ae.png)
#
ENG: **adds** new **models** and **textures** for the _cod_ and _salmon_ buckets, replacing it with a can of sprats.

RU: **добавляет** новые **модели** и **текстуры** для вёдер с _треской_ и _лососем_, заменяя их на консерву с шпротами.
#
![Cod bucket model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab03aa47dc4792dcf7fbcf9f02fc1cf8a1b8fc68.png)
![Salmon bucket model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7189570fd8741b60efe73cd83e595125aa9c70e.png)
